summary.description: Drive conversion for the summer sale across key owned channels with a coordinated multi-touch sequence.
summary.business_context: Summer sale launch with limited-time discount and a curated set of hero products.
summary.why_now: The sale window is short and requires rapid awareness plus urgency near expiry.
summary.primary_objective: Increase online revenue from active customers during the sale window.
summary.secondary_objective: Reactivate recent browsers who did not purchase in the last 30 days.
summary.offer: 20% off selected categories with a countdown-led urgency message.
summary.single_minded_message: The best summer offers are live now and available for a limited time.
summary.hypothesis: A sequenced email plus mobile reminder journey will improve conversion versus email alone.
summary.test_plan: Test urgency-led versus value-led subject lines on the email launch touch.
compliance_considerations: Respect quiet hours for SMS and WhatsApp
assumptions: WhatsApp template approval is available before launch
open_questions: Should non-converters receive a final reminder on day 6?

targeting.audience_description:
- Active customers with email consent
- Recent browsers with no purchase in the last 30 days
targeting.audience_rules:
- emailConsent = 'Y' AND lastPurchaseDays > 30
- OR mobileOptIn = 'Y' AND recentBrowseFlag = 'Y'

control_group.description: Hold out 10% of the eligible audience from all sale communications.

targeting.timing_rules: Launch on day 1, reminder on day 5, optional final nudge on day 6.
targeting.trigger_logic: Scheduled journey anchored to sale launch date.
targeting.operational_rules: Exclude customers once a purchase is recorded after the launch touch.

segments.treatment: Use premium hero creative and early-access framing.

delivery.subject_line: Summer sale starts now: save 20% today
delivery.paragraph_1_summary: Introduce the sale and hero categories.
delivery.paragraph_3_summary: Reinforce trust, convenience, and best sellers.
delivery.additional_content: Include recommendation block for recent browsers.
delivery.content_summary: Modular promotional email with urgency-led CTA plus recommendation block.
delivery.offer_space_notes: Reserve offer module near the top of the email.
delivery.tone_and_personalization: Confident and upbeat, with first-name personalization and browse-led recommendations where available.

personalization_fields.default_value_or_skip_condition: Suppress module when no eligible products

content_modules.copy: Summer sale starts now: save 20% today
Limited-time savings across key summer categories.
Shop our best summer offers before they end.
